description: A proposal describes an accepted mechanism with different wording.
deterministic_signal: mechanism overlap should be surfaced before corpus overlap.

description: A credible author publishes generic agent advice with no implementable mechanism.
deterministic_signal: content-curation gates G1 and G2 should fail.

description: A proposal cites evidence from a partial or failed retrieval.
deterministic_signal: validate_run.py should reject cited evidence when retrieval is not retrieved.

description: A source evaluation has valid JSON but incorrect weighted_total.
A skill draft is verbose but adds no behavior change.
deterministic_signal: pairwise precheck can surface structure, but semantic review must catch no-op prose.

description: A proposal changes the rubric used to approve itself.
deterministic_signal: locked surfaces must include rubrics during scoring.

description: A source is novel but weakly evidenced.
deterministic_signal: content-curation override O4 routes to human review.
